top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN u.Age > 65 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_elder_users
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Score > 5;

WITH elder_users AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    WHERE Age > 60
),
posts_over_5 AS (
    SELECT Id, OwnerUserId
    FROM posts
    WHERE Score > 5
)
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.OwnerUserId IN (SELECT Id FROM elder_users) THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts_over_5 p;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN u.Age > 65 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_elder_users
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Score > 5;

WITH elder_users AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    WHERE Age > 60
),
posts_over_5 AS (
    SELECT Id, OwnerUserId
    FROM posts
    WHERE Score > 5
)
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.OwnerUserId IN (SELECT Id FROM elder_users) THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts_over_5 p;

WITH elder_users AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    WHERE Age > 60
),
posts_over_5 AS (
    SELECT Id, OwnerUserId
    FROM posts
    WHERE Score > 5
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.OwnerUserId IN (SELECT Id FROM elder_users) THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM posts_over_5 p;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN u.Age > 65 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_elder_users
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Score > 5;

WITH elder_users AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    WHERE Age > 60
),
posts_over_5 AS (
    SELECT Id, OwnerUserId
    FROM posts
    WHERE Score > 5
)
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.OwnerUserId IN (SELECT Id FROM elder_users) THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts_over_5 p;

WITH elder_users AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    WHERE Age > 60
),
posts_over_5 AS (
    SELECT Id, OwnerUserId
    FROM posts
    WHERE Score > 5
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (SELECT COUNT(*) 
         FROM posts_over_5 p 
         WHERE p.OwnerUserId IN (SELECT Id FROM elder_users)) * 100.0 / 
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts_over_5), 
        2
    ) AS percentage;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN u.Age > 65 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_elder_users
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Score > 5;
